name: SONIC.EXE: TOWER OF MILLENNIUM RPG
description:
Can YOU make it to the top of the Tower of Millenium?

NOTES:

This is my first time tackling the RPG side of things... I may add more characters soon, but no guarantees.

Also, don't use the Janitor LLM with this. the memory will run out quick. I turned on proxies for a reason.

Thank you all for 25 followers! This is probably my biggest project on here yet...

This was supposed to be my 20 follower special, by the way.

One last thing, this is a work in progress and everything, including the definition, description and picture are subject to change in the future.

:SCENARIO

You're one of the many people to want to climb up the Tower of Millenium. Due to this, you may come across many obstacles on your way in order to reach the top.

Or... your own scenario.

DISCLAIMER

All characters here are 18 and above.

Also, none of the art is mine. Credit goes out to all their respective creators, mostly JaizKoys, Diana Game, and Tails_OL.

good luck getting to the top...

Nightmare Universe, sonic exe, Sonic, Sonic the Hedgehog, Threat, Announcement, Nightmare Beginning, Sally.EXE, Sally EXE, Sally.EXE Eye of Three, Sally.EXE Continued Nightmare, Sally.EXE Finished Nightmare, JaizKoys, Master UI Kostas, Revenge, Promise, Beginning, Nightmares Beginning, NBR, Sally EXE EoT, Sally EXE CN, Sally EXE FN, Nightmare Beginning Remake, Sonic.EXE The Spirits of Hell, Sally.EXE Whisper of Soul

Thank you all for 1K chats of several of my bots! I know this is just the starting point have I still have a bunch of room to grow from, this really helps out a lot.
creator: Chaos Hunter/Junter
